name: Cas9 gRNA Designer
description: Scans a DNA sequence for all NGG PAM sites, scores each candidate protospacer using Doench et al. 2016 efficiency rules (GC content, poly-T avoidance, terminal G), and returns the optimal Cas9 gRNA sequence.

inputs.name: seq
inputs.description: DNA target sequence to scan for Cas9 gRNA candidates. Accepts a resource name (e.g. 'pBR322'), a raw sequence string, a FASTA-formatted string, or a GenBank-formatted string. The framework resolves the format automatically.

outputs.description: A dictionary with grna_sequence (full RNA gRNA), protospacer (20 bp DNA), pam_site (NGG), gc_fraction, efficiency_score (0-3 per Doench et al. 2016), warnings (list of rule violations), and candidates_evaluated (int).
